headline: Everything you need to learn, practice, and win.
subhead: Built for consistency: small lessons, real practice, and a system that keeps you coming back.
reviewsSubhead: Real people. Real progress. All five stars.

hero.subtitle: The gamified financial education platform. Connect the nodes of your financial literacy, earn XP, and unlock real‑world wealth strategies.

demo.title: Demo
demo.body: Demo video coming soon. For now, start a learning path to see the curriculum and XP system in action.

features.title: Bite-sized lessons
features.text: Learn in 3–7 minutes with clear takeaways you can apply immediately.

features.title: Gamification & missions
features.text: Turn progress into momentum with points, streaks, and challenges.

features.title: AI finance assistant
features.text: Ask questions, get explanations, and learn the “why” behind each step.

features.title: Smart tools & practice
features.text: Simulate decisions with calculators and exercises that build confidence.

features.title: Track progress
features.text: See growth over time with clear milestones and next-step nudges.

reviews.name: Amina K.
reviews.title: Student
reviews.quote: I finally understand budgeting without feeling overwhelmed. The lessons are short and the missions keep me consistent.

reviews.name: Marco R.
reviews.title: Early-career professional
reviews.quote: The AI assistant explains things like a friend. I stopped guessing and started making decisions with confidence.

reviews.name: Sofia D.
reviews.title: Freelancer
reviews.quote: The gamified streaks are addictive (in a good way). I’ve learned more in two weeks than months of random videos.

reviews.name: Daniel P.
reviews.title: New investor
reviews.quote: I used to procrastinate learning finance. The bite-sized lessons make it easy to show up daily.

reviews.name: Lina S.
reviews.title: Entrepreneur
reviews.quote: The missions feel like a game, but the results are real. I’m tracking expenses consistently now.

reviews.name: Noah T.
reviews.title: College grad
reviews.quote: The tools + explanations helped me finally understand interest, debt payoff, and how to prioritize.
